---
title: The Role of the CPU in Energy-Efficient Mobile Web Browsing
author:
- Yuhao Zhu
- Matthew Halpern
- Vijay Janapa Reddi
categories:
- Show All
- Pre-2018 Work
topics:
- watt_wise_web
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/ieeemicro15.pdf
journ: IEEE Micro
year: 2015
contrib: Pre-2018 Work
image: featured.png
pub_number: 8
---
